instruction: Ranked comparison or long category labels need space.
instructions:
Bar (horizontal). Config: xField=measure, yField=category; seriesField + isGroup|isStack if multi-series.
Polish: autoFit; axis titles from fields; legend top-left only if series; label left when <=12 cats else omit; maxBarWidth~40; interactions element-active; muted grid; no decorative junk.
